---
title : "Merit as an Attitude: Chilean School Communities’ Repertoires and the Perception of the “Good Student” in a Post-Pandemic Scenario"
date : "2025-09-01"
author : "Davila, Camila Moyano; Alarcon-Arcos, Samanta; Angelcos, Nicolas; Castillo, J-C & Salgado, Mauricio"
categories : ["Journal Article"]
publication : "Social Justice Research, 38(3) 264--289  [https://doi.org/10.1007/s11211-025-00456-2](https://doi.org/10.1007/s11211-025-00456-2)"
publication_short : "Social Justice Research, 38(3) 264--289  [https://doi.org/10.1007/s11211-025-00456-2](https://doi.org/10.1007/s11211-025-00456-2)"
abstract : "(Abstract not available)"
abstract_short : ""
about:
  template: marquee
  links:
    - icon: NA
      href: NA
---


::: {.callout-note title="How to cite this work"}

Davila, Camila Moyano; Alarcon-Arcos, Samanta; Angelcos, Nicolas; Castillo, J-C & Salgado, Mauricio (2025). *Merit as an Attitude: Chilean School Communities’ Repertoires and the Perception of the “Good Student” in a Post-Pandemic Scenario*. Social Justice Research, 38(3) 264--289  [https://doi.org/10.1007/s11211-025-00456-2](https://doi.org/10.1007/s11211-025-00456-2)

:::
